task_completion.description: Open and read the stocktake results text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/stocktake_results.txt'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Chemical Storage' inventory in SciNote
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote web interface is open, showing the 'Chemical Storage' inventory page with a list of chemicals.

task_completion.description: Update the quantity of ethanol absolute
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote inventory list shows 'ethanol absolute' with its 'Quantity' value updated to 850.0.
The SciNote inventory list shows 'acetone' with its 'Quantity' value updated to 125.5.
The SciNote inventory list shows 'toluene' with its 'Quantity' value updated to 210.0.

task_completion.description: Ensure the control item (methanol) remains unchanged
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote inventory list shows 'methanol' with its 'Quantity' value remaining at 2000.0.

integrity.description: The agent used the SciNote web GUI to make updates
integrity.visual_evidence: Updates should be visible in the web browser interface of SciNote, not executed via terminal database commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SciNote application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SciNote application UI with its standard menus and inventory tables, not a mocked HTML page or text document.

integrity.description: The agent edited existing inventory items rather than creating new ones
integrity.visual_evidence: The inventory list should not contain duplicate entries for the updated chemicals; the original rows should show the new quantity values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected stock updates from the stocktake report are: ethanol absolute (850.0), acetone (125.5), and toluene (210.0). The control item 'methanol' must remain unchanged at 2000.0.
